events.title: Iran War: Environmental risk overview as of 27th March
events.summary: A month into the Israeli-US war against Iran we summarise current and emerging conflict trends and their potential implications for people and the environment. The post Iran War: Environmental risk overview as of 27th March appeared first...

events.title: Middle East war: Attacks on vital healthcare, evacuation strike fears
events.summary: Almost one month since Israeli and US airstrikes on Iran began, sparking a wider regional war, UN agencies and partners on Friday highlighted the terror among civilians fleeing bombardment, with “no safe space” to go.

events.title: MIDDLE EAST LIVE 27 March: Humanitarian crisis deepens across the region
events.summary: The war in the Middle East continues, with attacks causing further terror and suffering, deepening the humanitarian crisis across the region. The UN announced the launch of a task force to meet the immense needs. In Geneva, diplomats at th...

events.title: Persian Gulf crisis impacting food security, FAO warns
events.summary: The intensifying conflict in the Persian Gulf “has triggered one of the most rapid and severe disruptions to global commodity flows in recent times,” the Chief Economist with the UN Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO) said on Thursday.

events.title: DR Congo: violence intensifies as UN mission pledges continued support
events.summary: The security and political situation in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) remains “extremely tense”, a senior UN official told the Security Council on Thursday.

events.title: World News in Brief, Cuba blockade hits healthcare, Haiti’s ‘vortex of violence’, deadly Djibouti shipwreck
events.summary: Hospitals are just the latest vital public services to be hit in Cuba, more than a month since Washington took measures to block oil supplies from entering the Caribbean nation.

events.title: Ukraine: danger is only increasing, warns UN human rights office
events.summary: More than four years since Russia’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine, the “danger is only increasing”, particularly from attack drones, a top UN human rights official warned on Thursday.

events.title: World News in Brief: 273 million out of school, deadly attacks on Ukraine, migratory species in danger
events.summary: The number of children and young people out of school worldwide has climbed for the seventh consecutive year, reaching 273 million, according to a new report from the UN education agency, UNESCO.

events.title: Gulf war ‘out of control’, Guterres warns, as UN appoints envoy to push for peace
events.summary: UN Secretary-General António Guterres has warned that the escalating Gulf war is “out of control”, urging all sides to step back from the brink and allow diplomacy to prevail, as he announced the appointment of a senior envoy to spearhead...

events.title: MIDDLE EAST LIVE 25 March: All eyes on Strait of Hormuz; war is ‘out of control’, UN chief warns
events.summary: It’s day 26 of war in the Middle East. The UN chief says with the conflict now totally out of control, diplomacy must prevail. Ongoing strikes in Israel and Iran have included intensifying Israeli attacks against Hezbollah targets in Leban...

events.title: Gaza: Commitment to US-backed plan crucial to recovery, Security Council hears
events.summary: As tensions escalate in the Middle East, the international community must not lose sight of the situation in Gaza, an official with US President Donald Trump’s Board of Peace across the shattered enclave said on Tuesday in his first appear...

events.title: World News in Brief: Airstrikes continue in Ukraine, refugees return to DR Congo, emergency aid for the ‘Dry Corridor’
events.summary: The latest wave of Russian attacks across Ukraine have reportedly killed and injured civilians and damaged critical infrastructure in Dnipro, Odesa, Poltava, Zaporizhzhia and other regions.

events.title: Sudan: Hospital strike highlights surge in drone attacks on civilians
events.summary: The death toll from a horrific attack on a hospital in Sudan’s Darfur has risen further, amid a “sharp increase” in drone attacks against civilians this year, UN agencies said on Tuesday.

events.title: Haitian gangs expand reach as police are accused of ‘summary executions’
events.summary: Deadly gangs in Haiti are expanding their reach to include control over key sea and road routes as police in the beleaguered Caribbean island nation are being accused of using “unnecessary and disproportionate lethal force and summary exec...

events.title: MIDDLE EAST LIVE 24 March: West Bank attacks and Lebanon in focus as Security Council meets
events.summary: As the war continues to roil the Middle East and compound suffering for civilians across the region, the economic ramifications of the emergency are still playing out, with the Strait of Hormuz the focus of global attention with crude oil...

events.title: Ukraine violence ‘worse than ever’, Security Council hears
events.summary: More than four years after Russia launched its full-scale invasion of Ukraine, “the violence is worse than ever” and far from abating, the head of UN political and peacebuilding affairs said on Monday in a briefing to the Security Council.

events.title: SECURITY COUNCIL LIVE: Ukraine in spotlight as Russian strikes surge
events.summary: The Security Council is met for an open briefing on Ukraine, requested by European members following Kyiv’s 18 March letter citing a surge in Russian strikes. Inside the country, attacks continue to take a heavy toll: since 19 March, at le...

events.title: Dire fertiliser shortage a lurking threat due to Hormuz crisis
events.summary: Since the start of the Middle East conflict with Israeli and US strikes on Iran on 28 February, concerns have been growing over rising oil and commodity prices.

events.title: War in the Middle East: Cultural treasures damaged, with more at risk
events.summary: Since the outbreak of war on 28 February, several unique sites of cultural significance have been damaged in Iran, Israel and Lebanon, alongside immense suffering, displacement and death.

events.title: MIDDLE EAST LIVE 23 March: Civilians bear brunt of ongoing war
events.summary: The war in the Middle East is well into its fourth week and the humanitarian emergency it has sparked continues to be the focus of international attention, along with the energy crisis caused by attacks on shipping in key Strait of Hormuz...
